chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF THE FUQAHA (JURISTS) AND THE ULAMA (SCHOLARS)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 482)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 482)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي بُيُوتٍ أَذِنَ اللَّهُ أَنْ تُرْفَعَ قَالَ هِيَ بُيُوتُ النَّبِيِّ (صلى الله عليه وآله).

en.hubeali: H 14958 – Aban, from Abu Baseer who said:
I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the Statement of Allahazwj: “[24:36] In houses which Allah has permitted to be exalted”, heasws said: ‘Houses of the Prophetsas’.
en.sarwar: 511. Aban, from Yahya Bin Abu Al-A’la who said: I heard Abu Abdullah (a.s.) saying: ‘The armour of the Rasool Allah (saww), Zat Al-Fuzoul had two rings of foil in front of it, and two rings of foil at the back of it’. And said; ‘Ali (a.s.) wore it on the Day of Al-Jamal’.
